text: COLUMBIA RIVER WOMEN'S CENTER WOMEN'S CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full range of women's health services. 1810 East 19th Street Suite 209 The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 296-5657 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 296-5657 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Wasco County Services: Women's Health Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
